# cmccloudv2_opensearch_snapshot (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_opensearch_snapshot" "opensearch_snapshot11" { 
    cluster_id = "fce7d9ff-8060-4c0a-90c4-64cde8e53320"
    name       = "os-snapshot-01"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) OpenSearch cluster id
- `name` (String) OpenSearch snapshot name

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Status of snpashot

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
